title: DraftManifest
description: Machine-readable description of a design draft. Lives at the root of a draft directory as draft.config.json. A draft is a proposal made up of one or more axes; each page is a specific combination of axis choices realised as an HTML file.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor tooling.

description.description: Longer explanation of what the draft is exploring.

axes.description: Design dimensions explored by this draft. Optional — a draft with no axes is a single-page proposal.

items.description: A single design dimension (e.g. theme, layout, density). Pages combine choices across axes; switching an axis in the toolbar navigates to the page that holds the corresponding combination.

name.description: Lowercase identifier used as a key in page coordinates and a query param in the toolbar URL.

label.description: Short, human-friendly name for this axis shown in the toolbar (e.g. "Theme"). Falls back to a humanised form of `name` when omitted.

description.description: Optional longer explanation of what this axis represents, shown as a tooltip in the toolbar. Prose, not a label.

choices.description: The set of values this axis can take.

name.description: Identifier for this choice on its axis. Used in page coordinates and as the toolbar URL value.

label.description: Short, human-friendly name shown in the toolbar (e.g. "Cinematic"). Keep it to a couple of words. Falls back to a humanised form of `name` when omitted.

description.description: Optional longer explanation shown as a tooltip / secondary line in the toolbar. Prose, not a label — the toolbar never renders it as the primary text.

pages.description: Concrete files in the draft. Each page records the axis coordinates it represents and the relative path to its HTML. Sparse coverage is allowed; toolbar disables choices with no matching neighbour from the current coordinate.

coordinates.description: Choice name per axis, identifying which point in the proposal this file represents. Keys must match an axis name; values must match a choice name within that axis.

path.description: Path to an HTML file, relative to the draft root. Must not be empty or absolute and must not escape the draft root.

description.description: Optional note about what this specific combination demonstrates.

prompt.description: The brief that generated the draft. Free text, or a path reference like 'references/brief.md'.

source.description: Snapshot of where the draft came from.

sha.description: Git commit SHA the draft was generated from.

author.description: Author or agent that produced the draft.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp marking when the draft was generated.
